tasks.title: Orchestration script — checkpoint, polling, review gate loop, CLI
tasks.description: Write scripts/forge-run-mngr: the main Python executable that drives the forge pipeline via mngr. Owns checkpoint I/O, result-file polling, the review gate loop (plan and tasks), agent lifecycle wrappers, and the CLI interface (run, --reset, --status, --dry-run, --timeout).
tasks.design:
Single executable Python file. Shebang: #!/usr/bin/env python3. chmod +x.

Key functions:
  run_pipeline(feature, timeout_minutes, dry_run)
    - read_checkpoint(feature) -> dict | None  (plans/<feature>/pipeline.yaml, None if missing/malformed)
    - init_checkpoint(feature) -> dict          (all 7 steps pending, write to file)
    - for step in STEPS: skip if complete, else run_step()

  run_step(feature, step, checkpoint, timeout, dry_run)
    - if step in (plan-review-gate, tasks-review-gate): run_review_gate()
    - else: run_agent_step()

  run_agent_step(feature, step, checkpoint, timeout, dry_run)
    - agent = f'forge-{feature}-{step}'
    - mark_step(checkpoint, feature, step, 'in-progress')
    - mngr('create', agent)
    - mngr('message', agent, '--message-file', prompt_path)
    - result = poll_result(feature, step, timeout)  # polls plans/<feature>/step-results/<step>.json every 30s
    - mngr('destroy', '--force', agent)
    - mark_step(checkpoint, feature, step, 'complete' | 'failed')

  run_review_gate(feature, step, checkpoint, timeout, dry_run)
    - artifact = step.replace('-review-gate', '')
    - while passes < MAX_REVIEW_PASSES (7):
        spawn review agent with --message-file scripts/step-prompts/<artifact>-review.md
        poll plans/<feature>/step-results/<artifact>-review.json
        update_review_step(checkpoint, ..., passes, result)
        if PASS: mark complete, return
        spawn fix agent with write_temp_prompt(build_fix_prompt(artifact, feature, issues))
        poll plans/<feature>/step-results/<artifact>-fix.json
    - on cap: mark failed, sys.exit with unresolved issues

  poll_result(feature, step, timeout_minutes) -> dict
    - loop every POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS (30), raise TimeoutError at timeout_minutes*60
    - path: plans/<feature>/step-results/<step>.json

  mngr(*args, dry_run=False)
    - subprocess.run(['mngr'] + list(args))
    - in dry_run: print command, skip execution

  write_temp_prompt(text) -> str
    - write to tempfile, return path (for assembled fix prompts)

  build_fix_prompt(artifact, feature, issues) -> str
    - template string: read artifact, list issues, instruction to fix and write result file

Constants: MAX_REVIEW_PASSES=7, DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MINUTES=30, POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS=30
STEPS = ['plan', 'plan-review-gate', 'tasks', 'tasks-review-gate', 'execute', 'docs', 'pr']

Checkpoint YAML schema:
  feature: str
  started: ISO timestamp
  steps:
    plan: {status: pending|in-progress|complete|failed}
    plan-review-gate: {status: ..., passes: int, last-result: {verdict, critical, major, minor, issues: []}}
    tasks: {status: ...}
    tasks-review-gate: {status: ..., passes: int, last-result: {...}}
    execute: {status: ...}
    docs: {status: ...}
    pr: {status: ...}

Result file schema (plans/<feature>/step-results/<step>.json):
  {step, status: complete|failed, summary: str}
  review files additionally: {verdict: PASS|FAIL, critical, major, minor, issues: []}

CLI (argparse):
  forge-run-mngr <feature>
  forge-run-mngr --reset <feature>
  forge-run-mngr --status <feature>
  forge-run-mngr --dry-run <feature>
  forge-run-mngr --timeout <minutes> <feature>
acceptance:
- [ ] scripts/forge-run-mngr exists, is executable, has #!/usr/bin/env python3 shebang
- [ ] read_checkpoint returns None for missing or malformed pipeline.yaml
- [ ] init_checkpoint creates pipeline.yaml with all 7 steps pending
- [ ] write_checkpoint + read_checkpoint round-trip preserves all fields
- [ ] mark_step updates status and writes checkpoint to disk
- [ ] clear_checkpoint deletes pipeline.yaml; second call is no-op
- [ ] poll_result raises TimeoutError when result file not created within timeout
- [ ] poll_result returns parsed JSON when result file appears
- [ ] run_agent_step: creates agent, messages with --message-file, polls result, destroys with --force
- [ ] run_review_gate: PASS on first review marks step complete
- [ ] run_review_gate: FAIL then PASS marks step complete with passes=2 in checkpoint
- [ ] run_review_gate: 7 consecutive FAILs exits non-zero, prints unresolved issues, marks step failed
- [ ] mngr() in dry_run=True prints command, does not call subprocess
- [ ] --reset clears pipeline.yaml and exits without running pipeline
- [ ] --status prints step statuses and exits without running pipeline
- [ ] --dry-run prints mngr command sequence without executing
- [ ] --timeout overrides DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MINUTES
- [ ] checkpoint written after each step completes or fails (not only at end)
- [ ] in-progress steps on restart are re-run (treated as incomplete)
tasks.notes: Files: scripts/forge-run-mngr (create, chmod +x). Uses stdlib only: subprocess, json, yaml (PyYAML), argparse, tempfile, pathlib, datetime. No new npm dependencies. PyYAML may need: pip install pyyaml or add to a requirements.txt.

tasks.title: Step prompts — one .md per pipeline step
tasks.description: Write the 7 step prompt files in scripts/step-prompts/. Each prompt is consumed by a mngr-managed Claude Code agent for a single pipeline step. Prompts reference existing guidance docs and end with a result file writing instruction.
tasks.design:
File: scripts/step-prompts/plan.md
  - Instruct agent to follow guidance/plan-process.md
  - Read: plans/<FEATURE>/prd.md
  - Run self-review inline (guidance/review-gates.md self-review checklist) before writing result
  - Write result: plans/<FEATURE>/step-results/plan.json {step, status, summary}

File: scripts/step-prompts/plan-review.md
  - Verbatim plan review criteria from guidance/review-gates.md (### Plan review section)
  - Inject: plans/<FEATURE>/plan.md as artifact, plans/<FEATURE>/prd.md as source material
  - Write result: plans/<FEATURE>/step-results/plan-review.json {step, status, verdict, critical, major, minor, issues:[]}

File: scripts/step-prompts/tasks.md
  - Instruct agent to follow guidance/tasks-process.md
  - Read: plans/<FEATURE>/plan.md
  - Run self-review inline before writing result
  - Write result: plans/<FEATURE>/step-results/tasks.json {step, status, summary}

File: scripts/step-prompts/tasks-review.md
  - Verbatim tasks review criteria from guidance/review-gates.md (### Tasks review section)
  - Inject: forge tasks list output as artifact, plans/<FEATURE>/plan.md as source material
  - Write result: plans/<FEATURE>/step-results/tasks-review.json {step, status, verdict, critical, major, minor, issues:[]}

File: scripts/step-prompts/execute.md
  - Instruct agent to follow guidance/run-process.md (full task loop: pick task, spawn task agent in worktree, review loop, salvage, reflect, consolidate, graduate docs)
  - Read: plans/<FEATURE>/plan.md for execution strategy (single-pr vs phase-prs)
  - Write result: plans/<FEATURE>/step-results/execute.json when all tasks closed
  - {step: execute, status: complete|failed, summary: 'N tasks closed, M skipped (needs-human)'}

File: scripts/step-prompts/docs.md
  - Instruct agent to run /forge:docs --ship <FEATURE> process per guidance/docs-process.md
  - Write result: plans/<FEATURE>/step-results/docs.json {step, status, summary}

File: scripts/step-prompts/pr.md
  - Instruct agent to create PR: gh pr create with feature branch
  - Include PR title format and body template (summary + test plan)
  - Write result: plans/<FEATURE>/step-results/pr.json {step, status, summary: 'PR URL'}

Each prompt uses <FEATURE> as a placeholder. The script substitutes the actual feature name before writing to a temp file and passing via --message-file. (Or prompts can read feature from plans/ directory structure — see implementation note.)

Implementation note: prompts can use a literal placeholder <FEATURE> that the script replaces via str.replace('<FEATURE>', feature) before writing to tempfile — same write_temp_prompt() helper used for fix prompts.
acceptance:
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/plan.md exists and references guidance/plan-process.md
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/plan.md includes self-review checklist instruction (inline, not a subagent)
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/plan.md ends with result file writing instruction for plans/<FEATURE>/step-results/plan.json
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/plan-review.md contains the plan review criteria verbatim from guidance/review-gates.md
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/plan-review.md result file schema includes verdict, critical, major, minor, issues fields
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/tasks.md exists and references guidance/tasks-process.md
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/tasks.md includes self-review checklist instruction (inline, not a subagent)
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/tasks-review.md contains the tasks review criteria verbatim from guidance/review-gates.md
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/execute.md references guidance/run-process.md and instructs full task loop
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/execute.md result file reports tasks closed and skipped counts
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/docs.md references guidance/docs-process.md
- [ ] scripts/step-prompts/pr.md instructs gh pr create with correct branch and body format
- [ ] All prompts use <FEATURE> placeholder substituted by the script at runtime
tasks.notes: Files: scripts/step-prompts/plan.md (create), scripts/step-prompts/plan-review.md (create), scripts/step-prompts/tasks.md (create), scripts/step-prompts/tasks-review.md (create), scripts/step-prompts/execute.md (create), scripts/step-prompts/docs.md (create), scripts/step-prompts/pr.md (create). No code changes — pure markdown. Depends on FORGE-2.1 for the <FEATURE> substitution contract.

tasks.title: Unit tests for orchestration script
tasks.description: Write scripts/__tests__/test_forge_run_mngr.py covering checkpoint I/O, result-file polling, review gate state machine, and CLI flag handling. Uses mocked subprocess and filesystem — no real mngr agents.
tasks.design:
Test file: scripts/__tests__/test_forge_run_mngr.py
Runner: pytest (python -m pytest scripts/__tests__/)

Mock strategy:
  - unittest.mock.patch('subprocess.run') for all mngr() calls
  - tmp_path fixture (pytest) for filesystem I/O — no real plans/ directory touched

Test groups:

1. Checkpoint I/O
   - read_checkpoint: returns None for missing file
   - read_checkpoint: returns None for malformed YAML (does not raise)
   - init_checkpoint: creates pipeline.yaml with all 7 steps status=pending
   - write_checkpoint + read_checkpoint: round-trip preserves feature, started, all step fields
   - mark_step: updates status field and writes to disk
   - clear_checkpoint: deletes file; second call is no-op (no FileNotFoundError)
   - update_review_step: writes passes, last-result.verdict, .critical, .major, .minor, .issues

2. Polling
   - poll_result: raises TimeoutError when result file not created within timeout (use short timeout in test)
   - poll_result: returns parsed dict when file is written during poll loop
   - poll_result: result file path is plans/<feature>/step-results/<step>.json

3. Review gate state machine
   - PASS on first review: step marked complete, mngr destroy called once
   - FAIL then PASS: step marked complete, passes=2 in checkpoint
   - 7 consecutive FAILs: sys.exit called, step marked failed, exit message contains unresolved issues
   - Fix agent spawned after FAIL (mngr create called for fix agent)
   - Checkpoint updated after each review pass (not only on PASS)

4. CLI flags
   - --reset: calls clear_checkpoint, exits 0, does not call mngr create
   - --status: prints step statuses, exits 0, does not call mngr create
   - --dry-run: mngr() called with dry_run=True, subprocess.run not invoked
   - --timeout N: poll_result timeout_minutes = N
acceptance:
- [ ] pytest collects and runs all tests without errors
- [ ] Checkpoint I/O tests pass with tmp_path (no real filesystem side effects)
- [ ] read_checkpoint returns None for missing file
- [ ] read_checkpoint returns None for malformed YAML without raising
- [ ] init_checkpoint produces all 7 steps with status pending
- [ ] Round-trip write+read preserves all checkpoint fields
- [ ] clear_checkpoint is idempotent (no error on missing file)
- [ ] poll_result raises TimeoutError on timeout
- [ ] poll_result returns parsed JSON when file appears
- [ ] Review gate: PASS on pass 1 marks step complete, passes=1
- [ ] Review gate: FAIL×7 exits non-zero and marks step failed
- [ ] --reset calls clear_checkpoint and does not invoke mngr create
- [ ] --dry-run does not invoke subprocess.run
tasks.notes: Files: scripts/__tests__/test_forge_run_mngr.py (create). Requires pytest (pip install pytest). Add to requirements.txt if one exists, otherwise note in file header. Import the module under test via sys.path.insert or by running from repo root.
